---
title: "Web Scraping + Automated Grading"
subtitle: "AI Bootcamp — Session 2, Part 2"
author: Erkmen Aslim
date: 2026-04-27
format:
  revealjs: default
  beamer: default
---

# Web Scraping with AI

## Web scraping demo

<!-- Erkmen: replace this slide -->

- Identify a data source
- Ask AI to write a scraper
- Run it, inspect output
- Ethics: terms of service, robots.txt

# Automated Grading

## Automated grading workflow

<!-- Erkmen: replace this slide -->

- Feed submissions + rubric to AI
- Get structured feedback per submission
- Limitations: starting point, not final grade

# Wrap-up

## What to try next

**Teaching**

- Draft a new assignment or practice problems
- Build a study guide from your lecture notes

**Research**

- Try the explore → plan → code workflow on your data
- Use AI to clean messy data or reformat variables

**Writing**

- Revise a draft, check structure, restructure sections
